description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by dense, mature trees that partially obscure the structure from most angles. The building features a low, horizontal profile with a simple, rectangular footprint and a moderately pitched roof. The roof is covered by a thick canopy of green foliage, suggesting the house is nestled within a heavily landscaped lot. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a neutral tone, possibly stucco or painted wood, with a visible front entrance and several windows. The front of the bungalow is set back from the tree line, creating a shaded entryway. The overall impression is of a private, secluded residence integrated into a lush, natural environment.
description: A single-story bungalow with a low-pitched roof, surrounded and partially concealed by dense green trees, giving it a secluded and private appearance.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the dense tree canopy almost completely covering the bungalow, with only a small section of the roof and entry visible.
description_view_1: Frontal view with the main entrance partially visible through the trees, highlighting the thick foliage in front of the house.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view where the back and side of the bungalow are mostly hidden by trees, with only a portion of the roof and wall exposed.
description_view_3: Direct rear view with the back facade and roofline visible through the trees, showing the house's integration into the landscape.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with scattered windows partially obscured by trees
